title: V3Randomize: Fix dist operator inside ConstraintIf blocks (#7221)

features.name: dist operator inside if-else constraint block
features.description: Code should include a dist constraint operator inside an if-else block within a constraint
features.snippet: constraint c { if (mode) { x dist { 8'd0 := 1, 8'd255 := 3 }; } else { x dist { 8'd0 := 3, 8'd255 := 1 }; } }

features.name: dist constraint with weighted distribution
features.description: Code should include a dist constraint with weighted distribution values using := operator

features.name: if-else block inside constraint block
features.description: Code should include an if-else conditional block inside a constraint block for conditional randomization
features.snippet: constraint c { if (mode) { x == 1; } else { x == 2; } }
